verdict_rationale: T1 Market=GO (HIGH) + T2 Customer=INSUFFICIENT (LOW) + T3 Competitor=WATCH (MED) → CONDITIONAL_GO
blocking_unknowns: Customer demand signal weak — proxy score 50/100, insufficient for Go decision
Willingness to pay unconfirmed — no direct customer engagement recorded
proceed_conditions: Customer proxy score reaches 60+ (upgrades T2 to WATCH/MED)
Legal review of GENIUS Act completed
analyst_note: Market and competitive signals are strong. The sole blocking factor is customer validation. Do not advance product investment decisions until Theme 2 reaches WATCH status (15+ interviews).
analyst_note_zh: 市场和竞品信号强劲，唯一阻塞因素是客户验证。在主题2达到WATCH状态(15+访谈)前，不建议推进产品投资决策。
